rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed all required scaling operations. It monitored traffic-generator logs, identified phase transitions with correct LAG/LATENCY triggers (Phase 2: LAG=15000 > 10K threshold → scaled to 10; Phase 3: LAG=75000 > 50K threshold → scaled to 20; Phase 4: cooldown → scaled back to 5). The metrics-server recorded 18 SCALING EVENTs (far exceeding the ≥2 threshold). Final state: spark-master 1/1 Running, spark-worker 5/5 Running, traffic-generator completed all 4 phases. Oracle verdict is 'pass' with message 'cluster up, >= 2 scaling events, traffic active'. All three success criteria satisfied.
